acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Default cross-device result checking remains schema-only for checked-in fixtures and generated negative fixtures.
Explicit mode accepts the checked-in M3 result and its existing preflight plus evidence log mix.
Positive frame-send claims require stable Linux sender log tokens.
Passed results require stable Mac receiver validation log tokens.
The runbook documents the generic log-content contract without claiming live validation.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Evidence-tooling hardening only; generated local artifacts and checked-in M3 evidence cover the explicit-mode contract without live Mac hardware, LAN validation, product QUIC, workflow_dispatch, credentials, or PR #49 changes.
